reason: Verified agent responds correctly to math question with expected answer containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents
Clicked on "QA-20260331-011722-fagf" agent in sidebar - Agent page opened with landing chat interface
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status displayed as blue dot next to agent name in header
Typed and sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully submitted to agent
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent responded within 2 seconds with answer "4"
Verified response mentions "4" - Screenshot confirms agent response displays "4" as the answer to the math question
